Crates of Blúgzor, Zau, and Thrulbuz can be found near Lúksu in the Tower of Cirith Ungol. You have found Lúksu and must now sample his cooking.
Lúksu can be found in the Tower of Cirith Ungol. You have done your best to pretend that you ate and enjoyed Lúksu's food. You should now speak to Lúk…
